rationale: Gov't Code §1372.006 governs application and closing fees for private activity bond allocations. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 1372.006. FEES. (a) An application for a reservation under Subchapter B or a carryforward designation under Subchapter C must be accompanied by a nonrefundable fee in the amount of $500
_note: No conflict: the rule_text concerns private activity bond fees, unrelated to homestead exemption.
